jsonLd.title: Tanishq is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tanishq! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tanishq:
Tanishq is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tanishq!
